stage_title: 内存管理（物理/虚拟/分配器）

answers.stem: 该 OS 的内存管理实现语言/形态更接近哪类？（只选最贴近的一项）
answers.value: B. C/Makefile 风格内核（xv6 类）

evidence.excerpt: CC = $(TOOLPREFIX)gcc, AS = $(TOOLPREFIX)gas, LD = $(TOOLPREFIX)ld - traditional C toolchain for xv6-style kernel
Physical memory allocator implemented in C with spinlock protection, following xv6 design patterns
Virtual memory management in C with page table operations, COW, and lazy allocation

answers.stem: 是否存在“物理页帧分配器 (Physical Frame Allocator)”的真实实现？（必须三态）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: void kpminit(void) - initializes the physical page allocator with freelist
uint64 _allocpage(void) - allocates single physical page from freelist
void _freepage(uint64 start) - frees physical page back to freelist
struct pm_allocator { struct spinlock lock; struct run *freelist; uint64 npage; } - allocator state

answers.stem: 物理内存分配算法更接近哪种？
answers.value: D. 空闲链表 run list（xv6 风格）

evidence.excerpt: struct run { struct run *next; uint64 npage; } - linked list node for free pages with run-length encoding
Allocates n pages by finding suitable run in freelist, splitting if needed
Frees n pages by inserting into freelist and merging adjacent runs

answers.stem: 物理页帧分配器的核心数据结构是什么？（例如 bitmap 数组、buddy free list、slab cache 表、`struct run` 单链表等；必须引用结构体/字段证据）
answers.value: struct run 链表，包含 next 指针和 npage 字段表示连续页数

evidence.excerpt: struct run { struct run *next; uint64 npage; } - linked list node where next points to next free run and npage stores number of contiguous pages
struct pm_allocator { struct spinlock lock; struct run *freelist; uint64 npage; } - freelist points to head of run list

answers.stem: 物理分配器的并发控制锁粒度是什么？（全局大锁 / per-CPU / 分桶 / 无锁+关中断 / 其他；必须给锁对象类型与持锁范围证据）
answers.value: 全局大锁（global spinlock），使用 struct spinlock 保护整个分配器

evidence.excerpt: struct pm_allocator { struct spinlock lock; ... } - single spinlock protects entire allocator
#define __enter_mul_cs acquire(&multiple.lock) - acquires global lock before allocation
#define __leave_mul_cs release(&multiple.lock) - releases global lock after allocation

answers.stem: 是否存在“页表 (page table) 结构体 + walk/map/unmap”的真实实现？（必须三态）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: pte_t *walk(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, int alloc) - walks page table to find PTE for virtual address
int mappages(pagetable_t pt, uint64 va, uint64 size, uint64 pa, int perm) - creates page table mappings
void unmappages(pagetable_t pt, uint64 va, uint64 npages, int flag) - removes page table mappings
typedef uint64 *pagetable_t - page table is array of 512 PTEs (Sv39)

answers.stem: 页表操作 API（walk/map/unmap 或等价）对应的函数名/模块是什么？列出 1-3 个关键入口并给证据。
answers.value: walk(), mappages(), unmappages() 在 kernel/mm/vm.c 中实现

evidence.excerpt: pte_t *walk(pagetable_t pagetable, uint64 va, int alloc) - returns PTE address for va, allocates intermediate pages if needed
int mappages(pagetable_t pt, uint64 va, uint64 size, uint64 pa, int perm) - maps virtual address range to physical with permissions
void unmappages(pagetable_t pt, uint64 va, uint64 npages, int flag) - unmaps pages, optionally frees physical memory

answers.stem: 页表修改路径的并发控制是什么？（锁粒度、是否需要关中断、是否使用每进程地址空间锁等；必须引用锁/临界区证据）
answers.value: 使用进程锁 (struct proc->lk) 和全局锁保护，页表修改通常在持有进程锁时进行，不需要显式关中断

evidence.excerpt: struct proc { struct spinlock lk; ... pagetable_t pagetable; ... } - each process has lock protecting its resources including pagetable
Called during fork with parent process lock held, copies page table entries with COW support
Page fault handler allocates pages and calls mappages, called from trap handler context

answers.stem: 内核与用户地址空间关系更接近哪种？
answers.value: B. 共享同一页表（内核映射常驻，高半核等）

evidence.excerpt: pagetable_t kvmcreate() - creates kernel pagetable by copying kernel_pagetable, user processes share kernel mappings

evidence.path: doc/内核设计 - 页表映射.md
evidence.excerpt: 取消了原本的用户、内核页表分离的规则，将用户空间与内核空间合并在一个页表中
#define MAXUVA RUSTSBI_BASE (0x80000000) - user space ends where kernel begins, shared mapping above

answers.stem: 是否存在缺页异常 (Page Fault) 处理逻辑并与内存分配/映射联动？（必须三态）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: int handle_page_fault(int kind, uint64 badaddr) - handles page faults for COW, lazy allocation, and mmap
Calls handle_page_fault() for load/store page faults from user or kernel mode
Allocates physical page for lazy-allocated heap/stack regions on fault

answers.stem: 追踪一条缺页链路：trap/异常入口 → 缺页处理函数（handle_page_fault 或等价）→ 分配页帧 → 建立映射。用 3-5 个关键节点描述并给每节点证据。
answers.value: kernelvec.S:kerneltrap → trap.c:handle_excp → vm.c:handle_page_fault → pm.c:_allocpage → vm.c:mappages

evidence.excerpt: Assembly trap handler saves registers and calls C kerneltrap() function
void kerneltrap() - calls handle_excp() for page fault exceptions
int handle_excp(uint64 scause) - dispatches to handle_page_fault() for load/store faults
Calls allocpage() or handle_page_fault_lazy() then mappages() to resolve fault
uint64 _allocpage(void) - allocates physical page from freelist for fault handler

answers.stem: 是否实现写时复制 (Copy-on-Write, CoW)？（必须三态；若 implemented 需说明触发点在 fault 中还是 fork 中）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: #define PTE_COW PTE_RSW1 - uses reserved PTE bit to mark COW pages
During fork, marks writable pages with PTE_COW and clears PTE_W in parent
Called from handle_page_fault() when store fault occurs on COW page, allocates new page and copies content

answers.stem: 是否实现惰性分配 (Lazy Allocation)？（必须三态；若 implemented 需说明是在 brk/mmap 还是 fault 中分配）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: Allocates physical page on fault for heap/stack segments that were reserved but not mapped
Creates segment record without allocating physical pages, pages allocated on first access fault
Handles mmap lazy allocation - allocates pages on fault for MAP_ANONYMOUS or file-backed mappings

answers.stem: 是否实现 swap（swap_in/swap_out 或等价页面置换）？（必须三态）
answers.value: not_found

evidence.excerpt: No swap.c, swap.h, or swap-related functions found in memory management directory
Searched for swap, pageout, pagereplace functions - none found in vm.c
No swap-related header files in include/mm directory

answers.stem: 是否实现 mmap（文件映射/匿名映射）且处理标志位（MAP_FIXED/MAP_ANON/MAP_SHARED 等）？（必须三态；stub 需说明形态如 ENOSYS/return 0）
answers.value: implemented

evidence.excerpt: uint64 do_mmap(uint64 start, uint64 len, int prot, int flags, struct file *f, int64 off) - implements mmap with flags support
#define MAP_SHARED 0x01, MAP_PRIVATE 0x02, MAP_FIXED 0x10, MAP_ANONYMOUS 0x20 - flag definitions
System call wrapper that calls do_mmap() with user arguments validation

answers.stem: 是否存在 Page Cache（页缓存/文件页缓存）管理？（必须三态）
answers.value: stub

evidence.excerpt: struct buf with LRU list and hash table for block caching, but this is block cache not page cache
struct mmap_page for tracking mapped file pages with ref count, but limited to mmap not general page cache
No general page cache implementation like Linux page_cache, only buffer cache for disk blocks

answers.stem: 是否存在脏页回写 (dirty page writeback) 机制？（必须三态；若 implemented 需指出同步/异步与触发条件）
answers.value: stub

evidence.excerpt: void bwrite(struct buf *b) - writes dirty buffer to disk, but this is block-level not page-level
int do_msync(uint64 addr, uint64 len, int flags) - syncs mmap'd pages to file, triggered by msync() syscall
No background writeback daemon or periodic dirty page writeback found

answers.stem: 是否存在 TLB 射击 (TLB Shootdown / Remote TLB Flush)机制以支持多核页表一致性？（必须三态；若 implemented 需指向 IPI/跨核调用证据）
answers.value: not_found

evidence.excerpt: Only local TLB flush via sfence_vma() after page table changes, no IPI to other cores
No TLB shootdown IPI handler or remote TLB flush implementation found
No shootdown, tlb_flush_remote, or similar functions for multi-core TLB consistency

answers.stem: TLB 刷新指令/函数点是什么？（RISC-V sfence.vma / AArch64 tlbi / x86 invlpg 等，或仓库中等价的 TLB 刷新封装；必须给证据）
answers.value: sfence_vma() 函数封装 RISC-V sfence.vma 指令，在 include/hal/riscv.h 中定义

evidence.excerpt: static inline void sfence_vma() { asm volatile("sfence.vma"); } - RISC-V TLB flush instruction
sfence_vma() called after mappages(), unmappages(), and page table switches to flush TLB
sfence_vma() called in usertrapret() when switching to user page table

answers.stem: 用户指针安全检查机制是什么？（access_ok/verify_area/UserInPtr 等；列出入口点与校验逻辑证据）
answers.value: 使用 rangeinseg() 检查地址是否在进程段内，配合 copyin/copyout 进行安全拷贝

evidence.excerpt: int rangeinseg(uint64 start, uint64 end) - checks if address range is within process segments
int copyin2(char *dst, uint64 srcva, uint64 len) - safely copies from user to kernel with segment validation
int copyout2(uint64 dstva, char *src, uint64 len) - safely copies from kernel to user with segment validation
Handles page faults during copy operations with safe escape mechanism via kern_pgfault_escape()

answers.stem: 若实现了页面置换 (Page Replacement)，使用的算法最接近哪种？（Stallings Ch8：OPT 理想算法 / LRU 最近最少使用 / Clock 近似 LRU / FIFO / 未实现）
answers.value: F. 未实现页面置换（无 swap）

evidence.excerpt: No page replacement algorithm implementation found - no swap means no page replacement needed
No pageout, swap_out, or page replacement functions in vm.c

answers.stem: 是否存在工作集模型 (Working Set Model, WSM) 或抖动检测/防止 (Thrashing Prevention) 机制？（必须三态；Stallings Ch8 核心概念；若 not_found 需列出已搜关键字 working_set|thrash|resident_set）
answers.value: not_found

evidence.excerpt: Searched for working_set, thrash, thrashing, resident_set keywords - none found in codebase
No memory pressure detection or thrashing prevention mechanisms in scheduler
No working set tracking, page fault rate monitoring, or load control based on memory pressure

answers.stem: 物理内存总量（Physical Memory Size）：____ KB/MB；页大小（Page Size）：____ bytes；最大进程虚拟地址空间（Virtual Address Space）：____ bits。（必须从代码常量/链接脚本/配置中给出证据；无法确定则写 unknown 并说明已搜路径）
answers.value: 物理内存总量：4 MB (PHYSTOP 0x80600000 - KERNBASE 0x80020000)；页大小：4096 bytes；最大进程虚拟地址空间：39 bits (Sv39)

evidence.excerpt: #define PHYSTOP 0x80600000UL - end of physical memory
#define KERNBASE 0x80020000UL - kernel base address
#define PGSIZE 4096 - page size in bytes
#define MAXVA (1L << (9 + 9 + 9 + 12 - 1)) - Sv39 39-bit virtual address space
BASE_ADDRESS = 0x80020000 - kernel load address matches KERNBASE

answers.stem: 内存保护机制 (Memory Protection) 的实现形式更接近哪种？（Stallings Ch7.1）
answers.value: C. 硬件页表 + 软件指针检查双重保护

evidence.excerpt: #define PTE_R, PTE_W, PTE_X, PTE_U - hardware page table permission bits enforced by MMU
Software validation via rangeinseg() before copying user data, double-checks hardware protection
Handles page faults during user access with PUM (Protection User Memory) bit manipulation

answers.stem: 逻辑内存组织 (Logical Memory Organization, Stallings Ch7.1)：进程地址空间中 text/data/heap/stack/mmap 各区域（或等价区间）是否由统一的映射管理结构（VMA/区间表/链表/BTreeMap 等）维护？（如存在请给结构体证据；不存在则写未发现等价结构）
answers.value: 使用 struct seg 链表统一管理，包含 type 字段区分 LOAD/TEXT/DATA/BSS/HEAP/MMAP/STACK 等段类型

evidence.excerpt: enum segtype { NONE, LOAD, TEXT, DATA, BSS, HEAP, MMAP, STACK } - segment types
struct seg { enum segtype type; int flag; uint64 addr; uint64 sz; struct seg *next; uint64 mmap; ... } - segment descriptor with linked list
struct seg *locateseg(struct seg *head, uint64 addr) - finds segment containing address
struct proc { ... struct seg *segment; ... } - each process has segment list head

answers.stem: 是否存在显式的硬件分段机制 (Hardware Segmentation, Stallings Ch7.4)？
answers.value: C. 纯分页无分段（RISC-V/AArch64 常见）

evidence.excerpt: RISC-V Sv39 page table scheme - pure paging architecture without hardware segmentation

evidence.path: doc/内核设计 - 页表映射.md
evidence.excerpt: 使用 Sv39 的虚拟地址映射机制，有三级页表 - pure paging with 3-level page tables
No hardware segmentation registers (like x86 GDT/LDT) or segment selectors found

answers.stem: 取页策略 (Fetch Policy, Stallings Ch8.2) 更接近哪种？
answers.value: A. 按需调页 (Demand Paging)：缺页时才分配物理页

evidence.excerpt: Allocates physical page only when page fault occurs for lazy-allocated regions
Handles mmap page faults by allocating pages on first access, not at mmap() time

evidence.path: doc/内核设计 - 内存映射.md
evidence.excerpt: 基于懒惰机制实现的 mmap - lazy allocation for mmap regions

answers.stem: 放置策略 (Placement Policy, Stallings Ch8.2)：新的匿名映射或堆区域增长时，系统如何选择虚拟地址区间？（固定起始地址 / mmap_base 向下生长 / 首次适配 / 最佳适配 等；必须给实现证据或写未发现等价策略）
answers.value: 使用首次适配 (first-fit) 策略，从 VUMMAP (0x70000000) 开始向上查找空闲区域

evidence.excerpt: Searches from VUMMAP upward, finds first gap between existing segments for new mapping
#define VUMMAP 0x70000000 - base address for mmap region
For MAP_FIXED, validates requested address and splits existing segments if needed

answers.stem: 是否存在驻留集管理/内存负载控制 (Resident Set Management / Load Control, Stallings Ch8.2)？（包括工作集动态调整、内存回收守护线程、OOM killer、驻留页数限制等；若 not_found 需列出已搜关键字）
answers.value: not_found

evidence.excerpt: Searched for oom, oom_killer, resident_set, load_control keywords - none found
No memory reclaim daemon, kswapd equivalent, or background memory management thread
No RSS (Resident Set Size) tracking, limits, or per-process memory quotas implemented

answers.stem: 内存主链路（必须给出，尽量以 Mermaid graph TD 表达）：从确认的最强内存入口（缺页处理入口/mmap 入口/brk 入口/等价入口）出发，追踪到页表操作核心点或物理页分配核心点，写出 3-6 个关键节点。节点格式：FuncName [path:line]。若链路未被源码证据完全闭合，标注候选主链路而非确认的主链路。只画一条主链，不要并列展开多条支线。
answers.value:
graph TD
handle_page_fault[kernel/mm/vm.c:handle_page_fault] --> handle_page_fault_lazy[kernel/mm/vm.c:handle_page_fault_lazy]
handle_page_fault_lazy --> _allocpage[kernel/mm/pm.c:_allocpage]
_allocpage --> mappages[kernel/mm/vm.c:mappages]
mappages --> walk[kernel/mm/vm.c:walk]

evidence.excerpt: Entry point for page fault handling, dispatches to specific handlers based on segment type
Allocates physical page for lazy segments, calls uvmalloc which calls mappages
Core physical page allocator, removes page from freelist
Creates page table entries mapping virtual to physical addresses
Walks page table hierarchy to find or create PTE for virtual address

answers.stem: 该系统更容易出现哪种内存碎片 (Memory Fragmentation, Stallings Ch7.2)？
answers.value: B. 外部碎片 (External Fragmentation)：空闲块分散无法满足大连续请求

evidence.excerpt: Merges adjacent free runs when freeing, but fragmentation can still occur with varying allocation sizes
Uses slab-like allocators for small objects to reduce fragmentation, but physical page allocator uses simple free list
Free list with run-length encoding helps but doesn't eliminate external fragmentation completely

answers.stem: 地址重定位 (Address Relocation, Stallings Ch7.1) 的绑定时机更接近哪种？
answers.value: C. 运行时动态绑定 (Run-time / Dynamic Relocation)：通过 MMU 基址 + 界限或页表在每次访问时转换

evidence.excerpt: satp register holds page table base address, MMU translates addresses on every memory access
Sets satp register with MAKE_SATP(p->pagetable) before returning to user mode

evidence.path: doc/内核设计 - 页表映射.md
evidence.excerpt: RISC-V Sv39 分页硬件在每次访问时通过页表转换虚拟地址到物理地址

answers.stem: 页面置换的作用域策略 (Replacement Scope, Stallings Ch8.2) 更接近哪种？
answers.value: C. 未实现置换（无 swap）

evidence.excerpt: No swap implementation means no page replacement, all pages stay in physical memory
No pageout or page replacement functions found in memory management code

answers.stem: 是否存在清理策略 (Cleaning Policy, Stallings Ch8.2)？（即脏页预先后台写回，而非仅在置换时才写回；搜索 background writeback / kswapd / cleaner_thread 或等价；必须三态；若 not_found 需列出已搜关键字）
answers.value: not_found

evidence.excerpt: Searched for background_writeback, kswapd, cleaner_thread, pdflush keywords - none found
void bsync(void) - synchronous buffer write, not background writeback daemon
Triggered by msync() syscall, not automatic background cleaning
